channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Bitcoin soars on institutional bets—but regulatory clouds loom. BTC near $78K, ETH steady as giants load up. Japan tests blockchain bonds; U.S. regulation stalls. 🔥🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/big-bitcoin-ether-bets-institutional-confidence #Bitcoin #ETH #CryptoNews

item.title: SkyRL adds vision-language RL for scalable multimodal training—fueling VLM fine-tuning and RL workflows. 🔥 Learn how this shifts AI development. https://Blockchain.News/news/skyrl-vision-language-reinforcement-learning #AI #ML #RL

item.title: Nakamoto bets on volatility, not a sale—a Bitcoin derivatives program with Bitwise and Kraken to hedge downside and harvest options income. 📈🗝️ https://Blockchain.News/news/nakamoto-bitcoin-derivatives-program-hedge-btc-downside #Bitcoin #Crypto #Derivatives
